notes: Contact card kept in the shop binder and mirrored on the shared Box folder. Update when payroll rate changes, when a UA card expires, or when a phone number changes. Sunday calls to Paulie only for genuine emergencies.

crew.name: Paulie DeStefano
crew.notes: Runs day-to-day crew ops. Prefers text before 6pm; will pick up call after that only if it looks urgent.

crew.name: Danny Oliveira
crew.notes: Best on commercial boiler work. Portuguese first language, English fluent.

crew.name: Mike Russo
crew.notes: Hours entered nightly via Airtable clock-in; Gusto import runs Friday. Watch the payroll reconciliation, the Airtable log is the one to trust.

crew.name: Frank Desmond
crew.notes: Invoiced weekly; keep 1099 total under the reportable threshold check in December.

backup_office.name: Mark Murray
backup_office.notes: Handles Baxter's and Atlantic account calls when Jessica is on a jobsite. Do not put on payroll.

emergency_contact.name: Dorothy Murray
emergency_contact.notes: Cranston; no email. Sunday brunch 11:00 at her house is a standing block; leave the shop by 10:40.
